title: strychnos lanata
intro: Strychnos lanata is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Strychnos lanata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and malaria, as well as its use as a pain reliever. Strychnos lanata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy in traditional African medicine.
